title: RESEARCH: NYC & Rio Market Mapping (Phase 13)
description:
Perform market mapping and 'Fiscal Hook' identification for New York City and Rio de Janeiro (Phase 13).
1. Identify top 20 high-volume venues and management agencies in NYC and Rio.
2. Define the 'Fiscal Hook' for each:
   - NYC: DCLA grant alignment, insurance (PLI) automation, or specific US tax withholding (W-9/1099) friction.
   - Rio: MEI/Pix automation or local municipal culture grants (Lei Paulo Gustavo/Aldir Blanc alignment).
3. Update the global contact directory with verified leads.

title: EMERGENCY: Deep Dive 404 - Phase 2
description: The 404 persists after the duplicate html tag fix. Perform a deep dive into Vercel deployment logs (if possible via CLI or shared info) and verify that the build output matches the expected routing. Check if 'localePrefix: always' is causing issues with the root redirect. Test a local 'next build' and 'next start' to see if routes resolve correctly in the build artifact.

title: IMPLEMENT: CDMX, Rio, NYC City Pages (Phase 13)
description: Implement high-fidelity localized landing pages for CDMX, Rio de Janeiro, and NYC. Use the assets provided by the designer in the shared directory. Ensure fiscal compliance modules (RESICO for CDMX, etc.) are integrated into the city-specific tickers. Reference existing Paris/Madrid pages for structure.
